headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Intercepts Group 3 Drone in Rapid GRIZZLY Containerized Launcher Test
summary: Lockheed Martin Corporation (NYSE:LMT) is one of the best long term stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On June 3, Lockheed Martin successfully intercepted a Group 3 drone using its JAGM missile fired from a GRIZZLY containerized launcher, managed by the Sanctum C-UAS system. The entire end-to-end integration, from hardware-in-the-loop to live-fire testing, was […]

headline: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Leaves Russell Value Indexes After Big Defense Wins
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has been removed from multiple Russell value indices. The stock has been added to the Russell 1000 Dynamic Index following recent U.S. defense contract wins. The reshuffle reflects a change in how index providers classify the company within equity benchmarks. Lockheed Martin enters this index shake up with a current share price of $507.4 and a 1 year return of 12.5%. Over 3 years the stock is up 18.9%, and over 5 years it is up 52.2%. These shifts help explain why...
